rows.name: Ice Cold Treats
rows.description: Attack all enemies for 200% damage. Cleanse all removable debuffs from allied Supporters. Increase all allies Block and Evasion by 35% for 2 turns, increase allied Assaulters and Supporters Damage Rate by 70% for 1 turn, and restore all allies 40 Fury.

rows.name: Exclusive - Ice Cold Treats

rows.name: Friends Over for a Party
rows.description: When another female character is in formation, increase Swimsuit Rukia and all allied female characters HP by 20%.

rows.name: Big and Strong Protector
rows.description: When attacked, create a shield around self equal to the Attack of the ally with the highest Attack.

rows.name: Hard to Get
rows.description: Reduce all enemies Crit Rate and Hit Rate by 50%. Gain 10% extra HP when a non-Main male enemy is present.

rows.name: All Night Long
rows.description: When attacked, restore all allies HP by 30% of Max HP and increase their Defense by 50% for 2 turns.

rows.name: Goodbye Kiss
rows.description: When defeated, empty all enemies Fury and reduce their Defense by 80% for 1 turn.

rows.name: Gentle Byakuya Bond
rows.description: When attacked, has a 50% chance to Stun the attacker for 1 turn.

rows.name: Gonryumaru
rows.description: On rounds 1, 3, 5 and 7, attack all enemies with a 21% growth rate based on the total Attack of Gonryumaru's side. Inflict Bleed equal to 20% of that total Attack for 2 turns and reduce all enemies' Fury by 15. Increase all allies' Avoid Injury Rate, Damage Rate and Block Rate by 40% for 2 turns. Additionally, increase allied Vanguards' and Assaulters' Block Rate by 35% and allied Supporters' Combo Rate by 50% for the rest of the battle.
